# openrouter_workspace (Resource)

Manages an OpenRouter workspace.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openrouter_workspace" "example" {
  name                  = "Example"
  slug                  = "example"
  description           = "Example workspace managed by Terraform"
  default_text_model    = "openai/gpt-4o"
  default_image_model   = "openai/dall-e-3"
  default_provider_sort = "price"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Workspace display name.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly workspace slug.

### Optional

- `default_image_model` (String) Default image model for this workspace.
- `default_provider_sort` (String) Default provider sort preference (`price`, `throughput`, `latency`, or `exacto`).
- `default_text_model` (String) Default text model for this workspace.
- `description` (String) Workspace description.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp returned by OpenRouter.
- `created_by` (String) OpenRouter user ID that created the workspace.
- `id` (String) OpenRouter workspace UUID.
- `is_data_discount_logging_enabled` (Boolean) Whether data discount logging is enabled.
- `is_observability_broadcast_enabled` (Boolean) Whether observability broadcast is enabled.
- `is_observability_io_logging_enabled` (Boolean) Whether private observability IO logging is enabled.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp returned by OpenRouter.
